_comment: AIWF Studio engine configuration. Set enabled=true to activate training engines.
_comment_setup: See engines/<name>/requirements.txt for clone and setup instructions.

generation._comment: Shares the main venv. venv_dir is intentionally empty.

wan._comment: Optional isolated Wan video worker venv. Enable after running scripts/bootstrap_engine.ps1 wan.

kohya._comment: Clone kohya_ss into repo_dir, then set enabled=true and restart.

ed2._comment: Uses the main Studio venv with AIWF's ED2 overlay. Upstream ED2 requirements are skipped to avoid legacy core pins.
